Programs

Mobile Technologies

MENU

In recent years, there have been rapid developments in electronics, computers and control systems. As a result, computer-controlled systems have become widespread in almost all fields. Nowadays, there are almost no systems that work only mechanically. Artificial intelligence techniques have been implemented in design, production, maintenance and repair. Therefore, the design, production, maintenance and repair of advanced products are no longer a single issue. The combined use of mechanical, electrical and electronic, control and automation and computer technologies has become a necessity.

The aim of our Mobile Technologies program is to develop students who can follow new technologies in the web world, use up-to-date software languages on mobile device platforms, develop applications for mobile devices and publish their applications in application markets, have knowledge about mobile technologies, are open to learning, are researchers, can show innovative approaches, can work in teams. Our aim is to raise individuals who like to solve problems related to mobile technologies and who have knowledge of English at the level of reading technical documents.

The aim of the program is to have the ability to identify, analyze and solve problems related to mobile technologies and aim to apply what they have learned in the best way; Knowing their professional, moral and social responsibilities; To train technicians who respect people and society.

Our students who graduate from this program can work in all companies related to the IT sector operating in the public / private sector as mobile platform application developers, mobile application developers or software development specialists.
